name.en: Clock Tower Prison City - Dark City
name.ja: <ruby>幽<rt>ゆう</rt></ruby><ruby>獄<rt>ごく</rt></ruby>の<ruby>時<rt>と</rt></ruby><ruby>計<rt>けい</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt>と</rt></ruby><ruby>市<rt>し</rt></ruby>－ダーク・シティ
name.zh-CN: 幽狱时钟都市－黑暗城市

text.en: Each time you Special Summon a Level 8 or higher "Destiny HERO" monster(s): All Warrior monsters you currently control gain 300 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Clock Tower Prison City - Dark City" once per turn. During your Main Phase, if this card was activated this turn: You can add 1 "Destiny HERO" monster, or 1 card that mentions a "Destiny HERO" monster's card name, from your Deck to your hand. If this card is destroyed: You can Special Summon 1 "Destiny HERO" monster from your Deck (this is treated as a Special Summon with "Clock Tower Prison").
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：在发动了此卡的回合的自己的主要阶段可以发动。从牌组将1只“命运－英雄”怪兽或1张记载有该卡名的卡加入手牌。②：每当自己特殊召唤等级8以上的“命运－英雄”怪兽则发动。自己场上所有战士族怪兽的攻击力上升300。③：此卡被破坏的情况下可以发动。从牌组将1只“命运－英雄”怪兽视为以“幽狱时钟塔”的效果特殊召唤。
